title: strigosella cabulica
intro: Strigosella cabulica, also known as the Kabul poppy or Afghan poppy, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayas and the surrounding regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Strigosella cabulica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and boils. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies and formulations.
